arts.ttl: Brentford dealt huge blow ahead of Tottenham trip as star forward ruled out for 'months'
arts.sum: Kovacic was booked by referee Darren Bond, and issuing his assessment after the match, Frank agreed it was not a red card offence but labelled the tackle "reckless" and "cold-blooded". Brentford have been dealt a huge injury blow with Yoane Wissa set to miss around two months after suffering an injury during their 2-1 defeat at Manchester City on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou has already discovered his new Tottenham undroppable after notable change
arts.sum: Looking the most likely midfield player to make things happen for Tottenham in the final third with James Maddison's say on the game fading after a decent start to proceedings, Kulusevski and Spurs unfortunately couldn't find a way past a resolute Arsenal defence . Kulusevski looked to be a driving force from midfield for Tottenham and went close early on as he forced David Raya into action at his near post following some good play from Solanke and Son Heung-min .
